---
title: "Side projects and assignment work"
subtitle: "Data Science / Analytics Portfolio"
page-layout: full
---

Welcome. This site collects sample side projects, assignments and analyses completed


Below is a snapshot of my work — see the
[Projects](projects.qmd) page for the full list, or the [About](about.qmd)
page for more on my background.

## Featured work

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Replace this section with 2–3 of your strongest projects once they're in
place — link directly to their rendered pages, e.g.
`[Customer churn prediction](notebooks/churn-model.html)`.
:::

- **[Project title 1](notebooks/example-notebook.html)** — one-line summary of what it does and the result.
- **[Project title 2](r-projects/example-analysis.html)** — one-line summary of what it does and the result.

## Skills

`Python` · `R` · `pandas` · `scikit-learn` · `tidyverse` · `ggplot2` · `SQL` · `statistics`

## Get in touch

[GitHub](https://github.com/Yeamnnk
